channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tips, 6th April
item.description:
Various fly tips for collection on Charles Grinling Walk / John Wilson St please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charles Grinling Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: FixMyStreet ref: 9241881 Marked resolved but rubbish not removed, 6th April
item.description:
Random windswept packaging, boxes of various sizes and broken polystyrene packaging gathering along the railings of the terrace between numbers 21 and 41 Amhurst Road, and in the green beds.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parking outside flats, 6th April
item.description:
Cars are regularly parking outside 169 Denmark Hill flats, but there is no drop kerb and they are crossing the public footpath to do so illegally. The number of cars doing this has increased over the years and there are regularly up to 6 parked here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 218, Denmark Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing Machine dumped in the alleyway between 265 and 277 Upper Wickham Lane, 6th April
item.description:
Washing Machine dumped in the alleyway between 265 and 277 Upper Wickham Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stuart Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A commercial vehicle has been parked in a designated disabled bay for approximately three weeks. The vehicle is displaying a disabled badge that does not belong to the driver, effectively blocking access for legitimate users. The space is intended for people with disabilities, and a 94-year-old resident is now unable to use it., 6th April
item.description:
The commercial vehicle is misusing a disabled badge, which is not registered to the driver. This is illegal and inconsiderate, as it prevents those who genuinely require accessible parking—like elderly or disabled residents—from using the space. The vehicle has been stationary for an extended period, clearly indicating persistent misuse. To document this, a time-lapse video has been recorded showing the vehicle occupying the bay over multiple days. This evidence can verify how long the bay has been obstructed and support enforcement action by the council or relevant authorities.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Speranza Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire exit door in wilmot close ground floor, 6th April
item.description:
The door is broken needed to be fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9-10, Wilmot Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste bin lid is broken on Haddonfield estate in between William Evans House and John Brent, 6th April
item.description:
Foot pedal is broken and does not lift flap up. Needs to be repaired before weather warms up attracting insects and smell of rotting food

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bush Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cans and other litter and Detritus, 6th April
item.description:
The Monday litter pick is missed. Lots of cans, filth and rubbish in gutter and on pavement. Needs to be swept as well as litter picked. Thanks on both sides of road. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Haysleigh Gardens, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping: Wickham Valley Watercourse, 6th April
item.description:
There is some fly tipping in Wickham Valley Watercourse. W3W location: lakes.hulk.august

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress and chest of drawers, 6th April
item.description:
Just appeared over the fence today. Not there this morning, noticed at 3pm. Double mattress and part of a chest of drawers further along fence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 516, Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box containing metal canisters, 6th April
item.description:
Cardboard box containing metal canisters - maybe helium or another gas. Will attract other fly tipping. The canisters may be inflammable. I'm not sure what they are

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Haysleigh Gardens, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip near 1 Deventer Crescent SE22 8TJ, 6th April
item.description:
Cat litter, resident seen littering from Deventer Crescent on camera.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Deventer Crescent, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on stair case in Neville close opposite to Wilmot close, 6th April
item.description:
We find the graffiti on staircase of Neville close on 4th floor. Please paint it on wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wilmot Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic bag of kitchen pans n utensils, 6th April
item.description:
Fly tip of kitchen stuff will attract more fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Haysleigh Gardens, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mirror n glass dumped, 6th April
item.description:
Mirror n glass and other detritus dumped. Will be broken and cause worse and Dangerous hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa has been flytipped. Behind bins next to tree., 6th April
item.description:
A black sofa has been dumped in the area next to the tree in front of 20 Westcott. This was previously reported along with other household items. These were collected, but the sofa remains. It is slightly hidden behind the bins, but is directly under the tree. What3words location ///crib.flank.stops
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westcott Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Found very poor coms between AP1 and RP1 due to trees obstructing. Trees will require trimming back, 6th April
item.description:
Found very poor coms between AP1 and RP1 due to trees obstructing. Trees will require trimming back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 244, Royal College Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti & damage to bin, 6th April
item.description:
Bin has been paint sprayed with graffiti & damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime bike on the grass verge., 6th April
item.description:
The bike has been left on the grass verge outside 21A The Avenue for about a week now. The bike seems to have three stickers with three different numbers: * DAW-ECT * LE60FKV1XDO1221200 (the last few digits have been scratched off) * LE60HBV2XC022409023082
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees due for 3-yearly pruning, 6th April
item.description:
These trees appear to be overdue for their routine 3-yearly pruning and are now significantly overgrown. The dense canopy is blocking natural daylight and diminishing the effectiveness of street lighting, leaving the area unnecessarily dark. Regular maintenance responsibilities require pruning to restore adequate light levels, maintain visibility, and ensure proper management of the trees.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wolseley Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
